insights.title: Gender parity over time
insights.detail: Gender parity has improved by 0.09 points between 2015 and 2026.

insights.title: Platform diversity gap
insights.detail: Amazon Prime leads on diversity (0.73) while Apple Tv trails (0.69).

insights.title: Genre lead-role skew
insights.detail: Action has the highest male lead share at 74% of lead roles.

insights.title: Dialogue gap by genre
insights.detail: In documentary, female characters average 28% fewer dialogue words than male characters.

insights.title: Format-specific imbalance
insights.detail: Hbo Max is weakest in sports doc where gender parity is 0.40 and the sample still points to documentary dominance.

insights.title: Intersectional representation
insights.detail: Women of color hold 14% of lead roles across the dataset.

insights.title: Interaction homophily
insights.detail: Gender homophily in interaction networks is 0.04 (positive values mean characters interact mostly within their own group).
